<compiler>/tests/fixtures/missing-provider-effect/input.js:6:1: SLOPPYC_E_MISSING_PROVIDER: route uses unregistered database provider 'data.main'
  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/missing-provider-effect/input.js:6:1
   |
6 | app.get("/users", () => Results.json(db.query("select id from users", [])));
   | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
hint: Register the provider with app.use(...), builder.capabilities metadata, or an explicit runtime-only escape hatch once that pattern is supported.
